role: Demonstration project directory for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides a concrete example of ArchSpine's configuration (.spine), documentation (demo.gif), and source code (src) to illustrate the system's architecture and usage.

children.role: Central configuration and state directory for the ArchSpine system within a demo project.
This document serves as the comprehensive project overview and narrative guide for the ArchSpine mirror system, explaining its core philosophy, architecture, and usage.
A sample project that demonstrates the ArchSpine architecture with API, domain, and infrastructure layers.
